tools.name: get_design_context
tools.description: Get the design context for a layer or selection

tools.name: get_variable_defs
tools.description: Returns the variables and styles used in your Figma selection

tools.name: get_code_connect_map
tools.description: Retrieves a mapping between Figma node IDs and their corresponding code components in your codebase

tools.name: add_code_connect_map
tools.description: Adds a mapping between a Figma node ID and its corresponding code component in your codebase

tools.name: get_screenshot
tools.description: Allows the agent to take a screenshot of your selection

tools.name: create_design_system_rules
tools.description: Creates a rule file that provide agents with the right context to translate designs into frontend code

tools.name: get_metadata
tools.description: Returns a sparse XML representation of your selection that contains basic properties such as layer IDs, names, types, position and sizes

tools.name: generate_diagram
tools.description: Generates a FigJam diagram from Mermaid syntax

tools.name: whoami
tools.description: Returns the identity of the user that's authenticated to Figma

tools.name: get_code_connect_suggestions
tools.description: Find suggestions for mapping Figma node IDs to corresponding code components in your codebase using Code Connect
